assertions.description: Commit MUST succeed only when action state is AUTHORIZED AND ledger_authorization_ref matches; otherwise it MUST return conflict and MUST NOT append.

assertions.description: Cosign MUST be accepted only when action state is PENDING_HITL and token is valid and unexpired; otherwise MUST return conflict and MUST NOT append.

spec_documents: AGCP Policy Evaluation Contract (PEC) Specification v0.9.0
source.notes: Cosign gating rule reflected by cosign tests.

assertions.description: Returned state MUST equal state derived from ledger history.

assertions.description: Idempotency conflict (same Idempotency-Key, different payload) MUST NOT append to the ledger or mutate any existing action.
